content: agent1: implementing 'Add custom sorting for palette colors' - adding sort_palette param to Image.quantize in src/PIL/Image.py, plus tests in Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Will ping when done.

agent1: my sort_palette work is committed and pushed to team/agent1 (commit 92b61e8f2). Adds sort_palette param to quantize() signature (after dither) plus a new _sort_palette helper method placed right after remap_palette in Image.py. Go ahead and merge when ready - since we both touch the quantize() signature/docstring, conflicts are likely in the def line and docstring; happy to resolve on my end too.

agent1: merged team/agent2 into agent1 cleanly - both sort_palette and error_threshold params coexist in quantize() now (sort_palette then error_threshold in signature/docstring, error_threshold check runs before the quantize call, sort_palette applied after palette assignment). All 13 tests in test_image_quantize.py pass. Pushed as 19286313b.
